@keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes chatPulse { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(29,158,117,0.5); transform: scale(1); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(29,158,117,0.9); transform: scale(1.08); } } @keyframes shimmer { 0%{background-position:200% 0} 100%{background-position:-200% 0} }
